allow: Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4920/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"I need a job description for a Senior DevOps engineer with Kubernetes and security experience."}' --max-time 280)

Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4920/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"I need a job description for a Senior DevOps engineer with Kubernetes and security experience."}' --max-time 200)

Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4920/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"I need a job description for a Senior DevOps engineer with Kubernetes and security experience.","config":{"offer_sources":["ma2","gemma","rag"]}}' --max-time 220)

Bash(curl -s -XPUT http://localhost:4920/api/job2cool/chats/t_demo123 -H 'X-Forwarded-Email: tester@example.com' -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":"DevOps offer","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Write a DevOps offer"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Here is the offer."}]}')
